author: Lorenzo Faloci

cnn_scratch.architecture: Conv2D(32) -> Conv2D(64) -> Conv2D(128) -> Dense(256) -> Dropout -> Dense(255, softmax)

transfer_learning.phase: Phase 1 only — backbone frozen (Phase 2 fine-tuning not completed, GPU quota exhausted)

key_observations: Fruits-360 has uniform white background -> CNN Scratch very competitive
Transfer Learning converges 3x faster (7 epochs vs 20 for comparable accuracy)
Critical EfficientNet fix: add Rescaling(255.0) layer (expects [0,255] not [0,1])
On real-world data (varied backgrounds), Transfer Learning expected to outperform significantly
